knowledge_bases.name: Wikipedia English (full with images)
knowledge_bases.description_en: Complete English Wikipedia — all 6.8M articles with images. The most comprehensive offline knowledge source.
knowledge_bases.description_ro: Wikipedia completa in engleza — toate cele 6,8M articole cu imagini. Cea mai cuprinzatoare sursa de cunostinte offline.

knowledge_bases.name: Wikipedia English (text only)
knowledge_bases.description_en: Complete English Wikipedia, text only. Same articles, 60% smaller. Good for limited storage.
knowledge_bases.description_ro: Wikipedia completa in engleza, doar text. Aceleasi articole, 60% mai mica. Buna pentru spatiu limitat.

knowledge_bases.name: Wikipedia Romanian (full with images)
knowledge_bases.description_ro: Wikipedia completa in romana cu imagini.

knowledge_bases.name: Wikipedia Romanian (text only)
knowledge_bases.description_en: Complete Romanian Wikipedia, text only. Small enough to copy to phones.
knowledge_bases.description_ro: Wikipedia completa in romana, doar text. Destul de mica sa o copiezi pe telefon.

knowledge_bases.name: WikiMed Medical Encyclopedia
knowledge_bases.description_en: 73,000+ medical articles curated by WikiProject Medicine. Essential for emergencies.
knowledge_bases.description_ro: 73.000+ articole medicale curate de WikiProject Medicine. Esential pentru urgente.

knowledge_bases.name: iFixit Repair Guides (English)
knowledge_bases.description_en: Detailed electronics and device repair guides with photos. Phones, laptops, appliances.
knowledge_bases.description_ro: Ghiduri detaliate de reparare electronice cu poze. Telefoane, laptopuri, electrocasnice.

knowledge_bases.name: Wiktionary English
knowledge_bases.description_en: Complete English dictionary with definitions, etymology, pronunciations.
knowledge_bases.description_ro: Dictionar complet englezesc cu definitii, etimologie, pronuntii.

knowledge_bases.name: Wikivoyage Travel Guides
knowledge_bases.description_en: Travel guides for every country and major city. Maps, tips, visa info.
knowledge_bases.description_ro: Ghiduri de calatorie pentru fiecare tara si oras major. Harti, sfaturi, info vize.

knowledge_bases.name: SuperUser Q&A
knowledge_bases.description_ro: Intrebari si raspunsuri despre depanare computere de pe SuperUser.com.

knowledge_bases.name: DIY Home Repair Q&A
knowledge_bases.description_en: Home improvement and repair Q&A. Electrical, plumbing, HVAC, tools.
knowledge_bases.description_ro: Intrebari si raspunsuri despre imbunatatirea si repararea casei. Electricitate, instalatii, HVAC.

knowledge_bases.name: Electronics Q&A
knowledge_bases.description_en: Electronics engineering Q&A. Circuits, components, Arduino, embedded systems.
knowledge_bases.description_ro: Intrebari si raspunsuri despre inginerie electronica. Circuite, componente, Arduino.

knowledge_bases.name: Wikibooks English
knowledge_bases.description_en: Free educational textbooks on various subjects.
knowledge_bases.description_ro: Manuale educationale gratuite pe diverse subiecte.

minimal.description_ro: Setup minimal pentru drive-uri de 256GB (~55 GB)

recommended.description_ro: Setup recomandat pentru drive-uri de 512GB+ (~140 GB)

full.description_ro: Setup complet pentru drive-uri de 1TB (~200 GB)
